# Remove non-voter: r1 has 3 voters + 3 non-voters (6 total), config says
# 5 replicas with 3 voters. One non-voter should be removed.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=e
  store-id=6 node-id=6 locality-tiers=zone=f
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=6 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

repair-needed
----
RemoveNonVoter: r1

# Remove the extra non-voter. All three non-voters are healthy and equally
# diverse; one is chosen by diversity scoring + random tiebreaking.
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n6,s6 (replica-id=6 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 6
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n6,s6 (replica-id=6 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] result(success): RemoveNonVoter repair for r1, removing non-voter on s6
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=6 node-id=6 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=6 type=NON_VOTER)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm the removal: leaseholder reports 3 voters + 2 non-voters.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

# After removal enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
